title: Claude Code Creator Reveals Workflow, Sparks Developer Revolution
summary: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, shared his terminal setup on X, sparking a viral discussion. Developers worldwide are adopting his methods, calling it a watershed moment for software development.
body:
Boris Cherny, the mastermind behind Claude Code at Anthropic, has set the tech world ablaze with a simple X thread. What started as a casual share of his personal terminal setup has evolved into a full-blown manifesto on modern software development. Cherny's insights have developers everywhere scrambling to revamp their workflows.

The thread quickly went viral, with industry insiders hailing it as a watershed moment. Cherny's approach combines cutting-edge AI integration with time-tested developer practices, creating a hybrid workflow that's reshaping how coding gets done. The response has been overwhelmingly positive, with many calling it the most impactful developer discussion in years.

As the dust settles, the tech community is left wondering what's next. Will this spark a new wave of AI-enhanced developer tools? Can other platforms replicate Claude Code's success? One thing's clear: Cherny's revelations have changed the game, and the ripple effects will be felt for years to come.
twitterThread:
🚨 Boris Cherny just dropped the Claude Code workflow. Developers are losing their minds. Here's why:

1. He's using AI in ways we've NEVER seen before.
2. The results? Insane productivity boosts.
3. Every dev should take notes. #AI #Coding
Here's the wild part: His setup combines Claude's AI with terminal magic. Think: instant code reviews, auto-completion on steroids, and error detection before you even hit save.
The best part? He's open-sourcing his dotfiles. That means ANYONE can replicate this. Let that sink in. This changes everything for developers.
Industry insiders are calling this a watershed moment. Why? Because it proves AI can fundamentally change how we code. Not just assist. TRANSFORM.
Hot take: This is the moment AI coding tools go mainstream. Claude Code just set the new standard. Other tools? They're playing catch-up now.
